data.description:
## What
Reword DSO-lineage comments/docstrings in source (no logic change; the code is LIVE and stays).

## Files
- src/rebar/_engine_support/next_batch_files.py (lines ~9, 26, 47: read-config.sh / CFG_* bash lineage)
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/applier.py:31, outbound_differ.py:35, inbound_translate.py:27 (DSO_* removed notes)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] No code/logic change; full suite green
data.title: WU-2: scrub DSO lineage from src comments/docstrings
